PASSWORD_WEAK: The password must contain at least 3 letters (one uppercase), 3 numbers, and 1 special character.
PASSWORD_SHORTER: The password must be at least {constraints.0} characters long
USERNAME_LONGER: username must be longer than or equal to {constraints.0} characters.
EMAIL: The field email is not a valid email.
STATUS: status must be one of the following values: ACTIVE, INACTIVE, SUSPENDED.
PROFILE_EMPTY: profile must be a non-empty object.
USERNAME_NON_WHITE_SPACE: No spaces are allowed in the username.
USER_INVALID: One of the ids is invalid
PERMISSIONS_INT: Permissions must be a numbers array
